The '''Frozen Moon of Improcco''' was a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] that [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Improcco]] in the [[Coruscant system/Legends|Coruscant system]]. The [[Temperature/Legends|frozen]] moon had many massive underground vaults containing archived holdings of the [[Galactic Museum/Legends|Galactic Museum]].<ref name="CatCW" /> The [[Hair/Legends|fur]]-coated [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]] were regulars at the [[Ski/Legends|ski]] resorts of the Frozen Moon of Improcco.<ref name="HtSW" />

{{Moon-stub}}
